be_nice_to_the_other_attendees: Be nice to the other attendees
were_all_part_of_the_same_community_so_b: We're all part of the same community, so be friendly, welcoming, and generally a nice person. Be someone that other people want to be around.
remember_to_be_respectful_and_constructi: Remember to be respectful and constructive with your communication in discussions to fellow attendees. Don't get into flame wars, make personal attacks, vent, or rant unconstructively. Everyone should take responsibility for the community and take the initiative to diffuse tension and stop a negative thread as early as possible.
we_are_here_to_learn_a_lot_from_each_oth: We are here to learn a lot from each other. Share knowledge, and help each other out. You may disagree with ideas, not people.
be_a_good_listener_be_mentally_present_i: Be a good listener. Be mentally present in the sessions you are interested in. Join in on discussions, show up for the sessions on time, offer feedback on your event experience, and help us get better in our community engagements.
keep_off_topic_conversations_to_a_minimu: Keep off topic conversations to a minimum. Don’t be spammy by advertising or promoting personal projects which are off topic.
gdg_vizag_is_not_responsible_for_any_job: GDG Vizag is not responsible for any job opportunities, internships, collaborations, freelance opportunities and opportunities of any kind promised during the event and is just a facilitator of networking and visibility between local talent and local innovation and hence is not liable post event.

grow_your_knowledge_of_google_technology: Grow your knowledge of Google technology through meetups, collaboration, and more.
gdgwow_wonder_of_wonders_is_a_premier_de: GDGWOW (Wonder of Wonders) is a premier developer conference and 14-hour hackathon hosted by 33 GDG on Campus chapters across Andhra Pradesh.
gdgwow_is_taking_place_in_vizag_at_gitam: GDGWOW is taking place in Vizag at GITAM University from 4th, July  to 5th, July this year.
how_will_gdgwow_2026_work_for_attendees_: How will GDGWOW 2026 work for attendees unable to attend in person?

the_gdgwow_2026_visakhapatnam_hackathon_: The GDGWOW 2026 Visakhapatnam Hackathon is a 14-hour event where participants will work in teams to build innovative solutions using the latest technologies.
the_hackathon_will_take_place_on_the_4th: The hackathon will take place on the 4th-5th July 2026, starting at 04:00 PM on the 4th and ending at 06:00 AM on the 5th.
the_hackathon_is_open_to_all_registered_: The hackathon is open to all registered attendees of GDGWOW 2026 Visakhapatnam. Participants can register as teams ranging from 3 to 5 members. Teams can be formed on the spot during the event. The team registration panel can be found

participants_are_expected_to_stay_overni: Participants are expected to stay overnight at the venue during the hackathon. However, in case of any emergency, participants can leave the venue and return the next day by 08:00 AM sharp.
however_they_must_inform_the_organizers_: However, they must inform the organizers about their absence and provide a valid reason. Also, atleast two members of the team must be present at the venue at all times.

It involves playing games, attending workshops, and earning points that translate to swags and special discounts for the World of Wonders 2026 conference.
